lints.name: pg_graphql_anon_table_exposed
lints.title: Public Can See Object in GraphQL Schema
lints.description: Detects tables, views, materialized views, and foreign tables that are visible in the GraphQL schema to anyone using your public anon key. Revoke `SELECT` from `anon` for objects that should not be discoverable before sign-in, and check lint 0027 for the matching signed-in-user exposure.
lints.detail: table `public.alps_audit_log` is visible in the GraphQL schema because the `anon` role can `SELECT` it. Revoke `SELECT` from `anon` if it should not be discoverable without signing in.

lints.detail: table `public.alps_lookup_tables` is visible in the GraphQL schema to signed-in users because the `authenticated` role can `SELECT` it. Revoke `SELECT` from `authenticated` if it should not be discoverable to every account.

lints.name: anon_security_definer_function_executable
lints.title: Public Can Execute SECURITY DEFINER Function
lints.description: Detects `SECURITY DEFINER` functions that are callable without signing in. Revoke `EXECUTE`, switch the function to `SECURITY INVOKER`, or move it out of your exposed API schema if it is not meant to be public.
lints.detail: Function `public.execute_contact_merge(p_cluster_id uuid, p_winner_contact_id uuid, p_loser_contact_ids uuid[], p_field_selections jsonb, p_merged_by uuid, p_organization_id uuid)` can be executed by the `anon` role as a `SECURITY DEFINER` function via `/rest/v1/rpc/execute_contact_merge`. Revoke `EXECUTE` or switch it to `SECURITY INVOKER` if that is not intentional.

metadata.name: execute_contact_merge
metadata.arguments: p_cluster_id uuid, p_winner_contact_id uuid, p_loser_contact_ids uuid[], p_field_selections jsonb, p_merged_by uuid, p_organization_id uuid

lints.cache_key: anon_security_definer_function_executable_public_execute_contact_merge_p_cluster_id uuid, p_winner_contact_id uuid, p_loser_contact_ids uuid[], p_field_selections jsonb, p_merged_by uuid, p_organization_id uuid

lints.name: auth_leaked_password_protection
lints.title: Leaked Password Protection Disabled
lints.description: Leaked password protection is currently disabled.
lints.detail: Supabase Auth prevents the use of compromised passwords by checking against HaveIBeenPwned.org. Enable this feature to enhance security.
